resources.string: For each match click on the team you predict to win. Click on both teams to predict a draw.
You can predict the winners for each match in a multitude of competitions of your choosing.
Points are gained per match correctly predicted.
Create your own league in Setup. Invite your friends to make their predictions too.
Select the competitions you would like to see on your home screen.\n
Create your own leagues and invite friends to join you.
Select the language you would like to use in the app.
Note: If this is your first time logging in, the password you enter will be saved as your permanent password.
Go to Setup, give yourself an in-game name, then select which competitions and leagues you want to be able to see.
How do I make a prediction?

Go to the Matches screen and choose the competition matches you would like to predict. Once the matches page has opened, click on which team you think will win. If you think the match will be a draw, click on both team names. Selected teams should be highlighted in green.
How do I undo a prediction?
Go to the Matches page of your prediction and click on the team selected green. It will unselect your prediction.

You earn 1 point for every correct result (Home Win, Draw, or Away Win). The result is taken after the match is completed. For example, if the match goes to extra time and a shoot off, the result will be taken after those are complete. For knockout games it is no use choosing a draw.
You can make or change predictions any time up until one minute before the match kicks off.
Whilst Match pages will open on the next available match, you can scroll up to see results. If your selected team remains green, your prediction was good. If not, the selection will turn red.
How do I join a friend\'s league?

If your friend has sent you an invite, you can go to \'Setup\' > \'Leagues\', then select the league by checking the checkbox. Once you return to the home screen, you can then select the Leagues option to see your friends league with you now in it.
How do I change the language displayed?

The application will default to the language defined on your phone, if it is available within the application. If you have recently changed the language settings on your phone and the language displayed in the application is not correct, go into the Setup screen and then return to the Home page. This will reinitialise the language displayed. If the application still doesn\'t display in your language, please log a ticket in the \'Ideas & Bugs\' page and we will review for a future release.
How do I create a league?

Go to \'Setup\' > \'Leagues\' and click the \'+\' button at the bottom of the list of leagues. You must give the league a name and select a single competition. You can then invite friends by inserting their emails into the email text field at the bottom of the page, and click \'Add\' to confirm the email is correct. Once you have added your friends\' emails, click on the Save button to create the league. You will be returned to the Setup Leagues screen. Ensure your new league is selected for you to see it in the application.
How do I edit a league?

Go to \'Setup\' > \'Leagues\' and click the triple dot icon to the right of the league you wish to edit. Then choose \'Edit League\'. Remember to save your league once the edit is complete. Note, you can only edit leagues which you have created.
How do I delete a league?
Go to \'Setup\' > \'Leagues\' and click the triple dot icon to the right of the league you wish to delete. Note, you can only delete leagues which you have created.
How do I report an issue or an idea?
Go to \'Ideas & Bugs\' and complete the template. We will respond as soon as we can.
Are you sure you want to delete

ScoreProf respects your privacy. 

 1. Information We Collect: We collect your email address to manage your account and predictions. 
 2. Third-Party Services: We use Google AdMob to display ads. Google may use device identifiers to personalize content. 
 3. Data Security: Your data is stored securely on our private servers. 
 4. Your Rights: You can request account deletion at any time by contacting support.
Please enter a valid email address
